sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ بَعْضُ الشَّبَابِ كَصُنَّاعِ مُحْتَوَى عَلَى الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Neki mladi ljudi rade kao kreatori sadržaja na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: Some young people work as content creators on the internet.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُونَ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو عَنِ السَّفَرِ وَالطَّبْخِ وَالتَّعْلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Oni pružaju video snimke o putovanjima, kuhanju i obrazovanju.
sentences.translationEn: They provide video clips about travel, cooking, and education.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُهُمْ مَلَايِينُ النَّاسِ مِنْ جَمِيعِ أَنْحَاءِ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Prate ih milioni ljudi iz cijelog svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: Millions of people from all over the world follow them.
